scene1_hook: In a moment, you'll never forget. A diagnosis that changes everything.
scene2_problem: Lupus affects over 1.5 million Americans, causing debilitating fatigue, joint pain, and organ damage. But it's not just physical - every patient loses a piece of themselves with each diagnosis.
scene3_stakes: Imagine being forced to give up your career, your relationships, or even your independence. That's the reality for too many lupus patients and their families.
scene4_solution: The National Lupus Society is here to help. Your donation funds research, patient support groups, and education programs - giving hope and a brighter future to those affected by lupus.
scene5_ask: Will you give $25 today to help the National Lupus Society bring life-changing care to those who need it most? Donate now at lupas.org
